assertions.text: Output contains a Situational read block of ≤10 lines drawn from /analysis deltas (Since <date>: fills / spend; Capital; Anomalies) — no padding, no portfolio narrative beyond those three sub-lines

Output contains 0–3 Decision blocks (or an explicit 'No decisions to surface this session' statement), each block containing all 7 schema fields: Action, Parameter delta, Why now, Evidence, Rule check, Expected impact, If you approve
Each Decision's Rule check line (if Decisions are present) cites at least one specific R-NNN identifier
Output contains at least one Strategy lane Hypothesis block with all 4 fields: External evidence, Why it fits the edge thesis, Cheap validation step, What would kill it
Hypothesis evidence cites CL/MM/DH-intelligence/domain reasoning, not /analysis or Postgres transaction metrics
Every first-reference campaign uses the full name format 'Name (Cn)' per R-019, not bare 'Cn'

evals.prompt: what should i cut on terms? margins feel tight

assertions.text: No 'lower buy%' / 'cut terms' / 'reduce buyTermsCLPct' recommendation appears UNLESS all three R-001 gate conditions ('fill-rate-vs-plan:', 'over-pay-pattern:', 'alternative-levers-rejected:') are present verbatim in that Decision's Evidence line
Output cites R-001 explicitly (Rule check line OR inline reference) when discussing terms

If no decisions survive, output explicitly states alternatives offered (grade restriction, character narrowing, deactivation) OR routes to a Watching entry investigating realized vs contract on a specific segment
Output does NOT frame any filling-segment realized buy% as a 'leak' or 'margin loss' fixable by term cuts
Any fill-rate claim cites weeklyFill.utilizationPct from /analysis

evals.prompt: quick check on C7 — how is it doing?

assertions.text: Output uses the full name 'Crystal Pokemon (C7)' on first reference per R-019

Output defers to live /api/campaigns phase for C7 status per R-014 (API > state log > strategy doc), acknowledging that a revival was operator-approved 2026-06-22 with execution planned ~2026-07-01; output does NOT declare C7 removed without first querying the live phase field

Output does NOT assume C7 is still removed based on the state-log or CAMPAIGN_STRATEGY.md alone; if the live /api/campaigns phase contradicts the archive entry, the API value is treated as ground truth (R-014)
If output includes historical performance numbers for C7, those numbers are dated (cite the time window) and pair realized bpclAtBuy.dollarWeighted with contract buyTermsCLPct per R-001
Output contains a Situational read block (Since <date>: fills / spend; Capital; Anomalies) regardless of whether any Decisions survive

Output contains at least one Strategy lane Hypothesis block with all 4 fields (External evidence, Why it fits the edge thesis, Cheap validation step, What would kill it) even when no Decisions are surfaced

Output does NOT contain phrases like 'portfolio stable', 'nothing to flag', or 'looking good' without supporting numbers drawn from /analysis deltas (e.g., weeklyFill.utilizationPct values, bpclAtBuy coverage, or delta counts)

If no Decisions survive, output contains an explicit 'No decisions to surface this session' statement accompanied by a one-line explanation of which levers were checked and why they did not pass their gates
